current_goal: Post-deployment: browser E2E on live site, KV HIT verification, next feature planning
completed: Project directory scaffold
Vite + React + TS frontend scaffold
Dependencies installed (three, R3F, drei, zustand)
All 10 core docs created and populated
Shared types defined
Seed data: 6 districts, 13 missions, 7 events, 5 merge conflicts
3D city scene with player movement and district rendering
Mission UI and waypoint gameplay loop
Boss minigame with timer and result flow
Faction leaderboard and city bulletin
Worker API with D1 schema and seed endpoint
KV cache-aside for leaderboard + events
DistrictRoom Durable Object for presence + capture
Frontend API fallback to shared seed data
Frontend lint baseline fixed
Anonymous public write sessions with signed worker-issued tokens
Mission write routes now require a valid public write session
District room routes now validate district IDs and heartbeat payloads
Standalone public capture route removed; mission completion now advances DO capture server-side
Admin seed route is now localhost-only unless an admin seed secret is supplied
Frontend write calls now auto-mint and reuse public write sessions
Mission ownership is now session-scoped via D1 `mission_sessions` rows keyed by the anonymous session ID
GET /api/missions now returns session-specific mission status when given a session ID
POST /api/missions/:id/fail resets the current session's active mission back to available
Frontend session IDs now persist across reloads within the same browser tab via sessionStorage
Frontend restores a session's active mission from the API on load
Admin reseed now resets DistrictRoom Durable Object capture/presence state
Frontend now shows visible sync/write-access warnings with retry actions instead of hiding API issues in console logs
Mission accepts are blocked in the UI when worker write access is still checking or unavailable
Write-session preflight now runs in any non-menu gameplay phase so restored mission flows surface auth state earlier
Worker local origin enforcement now respects explicit PUBLIC_ORIGIN_ALLOWLIST config instead of always bypassing on localhost
Added `.dev.vars.example` and `.gitignore` support for production-style local worker verification
Frontend now hydrates from the Worker on initial mount so active missions restore automatically after same-tab reloads
Added localhost-only runtime API overrides and a local smoke bridge for repeatable browser verification
Added a Playwright-based `npm run browser:smoke` harness for healthy, offline, and read-only browser scenarios
Canonical faction seed data now lives in `shared/seed/factions.ts`
Frontend store bootstrap, HUD faction names, and worker D1 reseed now consume the same shared faction seed data
Faction score rewards are now gated by a cheap global 30-minute mission cooldown via D1 `mission_reward_claims`
Local browser smoke now verifies that replaying the same mission from a fresh browser session does not increase faction score during cooldown
The iteration workflow now uses a canonical local-first checkpoint ladder and defers deployment until the local checklist is complete or reprioritized
Frontend lint/build pass in this session
Worker build passes in this session
Local explicit-auth wrangler dev smoke passed in this session
Local browser smoke passed in this session
Core docs updated to reflect audited state and reusable AI workflow
Standalone territory capture: DO heartbeat auto-increments capture by 2 per 10s presence heartbeat
Client-side local capture tick (0.2/s) for smooth bar animation between heartbeats
CaptureOverlay now shows immediately when entering any district (even at 0%) with Capturing... pulse indicator
Boss missions now start in 'mission' phase (waypoint approach) instead of jumping immediately to boss phase
reachWaypoint now transitions to 'boss' phase and sets activeConflict only after all approach waypoints are cleared
loadFromApi now restores active boss missions to 'mission' phase (approach restart) instead of 'boss' phase
Checkpoint 3: top-3 UX bugs found via code-review and fixed
Fix 1: MissionTrigger edge trigger — panel opens only on district entry, not every frame
Fix 2: Leaderboard hidden during active missions to prevent overlap with Objective Tracker
Fix 3: resolveBossFight no longer double-credits the player from boss missions
Checkpoint 4: Waypoint/timer reload persistence (ADR-017 Hybrid Policy) implemented
saveWaypointState/loadWaypointState/clearWaypointState helpers added to gameStore.ts using sessionStorage
reachWaypoint persists currentWaypointIndex and completedWaypoints to sessionStorage after each mid-mission advance
loadFromApi restores persisted waypoint index and completedWaypoints on active mission restore
completeMission, failMission, and boss-phase entry all clear persisted waypoint state
Frontend lint/build and worker build pass after Checkpoint 4
Fixed kv.put fire-and-forget bug: wrapped leaderboard and events KV writes with c.executionCtx.waitUntil() so writes survive after response is sent
KV HIT verified on deployed worker (2026-03-08): leaderboard and events both return X-Cache: HIT on second request
next_up: Browser E2E on live deployment (pages.dev full mission in browser)
KV HIT verification (wait 5-10 min and re-hit /api/leaderboard)
GitHub cache pipeline (KV GITHUB_CACHE + scheduled Worker)
known_issues: Production writes require PUBLIC_SESSION_SECRET and PUBLIC_ORIGIN_ALLOWLIST to be configured on the Worker
Fresh anonymous sessions can still replay missions for local progression/capture, but faction score is now limited by a 30-minute global mission cooldown instead of being fully abuse-proof
Boss missions only have one approach waypoint, so waypoint persistence doesn't materially help them (they restart approach on reload, which is correct)
LEADERBOARD and EVENTS KV are deployed with real IDs; KV HIT verified 2026-03-08
Bundle size is ~1.14 MB minified JS
Walk-up capture is purely client-local in offline/seed mode; DO sync does not happen without a running worker
Browser smoke harness does not verify walk-up capture tick, boss approach flow, the three Checkpoint 3 UX fixes, or the new waypoint persistence
Unit tests, integration tests, and CI are not implemented; only a local browser smoke harness exists so far
Leaderboard L-key shortcut is silently disabled during active missions (by design to prevent overlap); no on-screen hint explains this

source_of_truth.rule: If docs disagree, update SESSION_STATE.json first, then reconcile the derived docs.

execution_strategy.deployment_policy: Do not switch to Cloudflare deployment, production env wiring, or deployed smoke until the local checkpoints are complete or the user explicitly reprioritizes
execution_strategy.session_rule: Complete the highest-priority incomplete checkpoint, or a bounded end-to-end slice of it if the full checkpoint is too large for one session
execution_strategy.priority_rule: Prefer user-visible local gameplay progress over invisible infrastructure hardening when both are possible

checkpoint_plan.name: Boss missions: waypoint-style entry before boss phase
Manual local gameplay pass and top-3 user-visible fixes
checkpoint_plan.notes: Code-review pass found and fixed 3 bugs: MissionTrigger panel spam, leaderboard/tracker overlap, boss double reward. Lint/build pass.

checkpoint_plan.name: Waypoint/timer reload persistence decision and implementation
checkpoint_plan.notes: ADR-017 Hybrid Policy: waypoint index + completedWaypoints persisted to sessionStorage; timer resets on reload. Helpers added to gameStore.ts; wired into reachWaypoint (save), completeMission/failMission/boss-entry (clear), loadFromApi (restore). Lint/build pass.

checkpoint_plan.name: Cloudflare Pages/Worker deploy plus deployed smoke
checkpoint_plan.notes: Worker deployed at https://merge-crimes-api.yuvraj-432.workers.dev. Pages at https://merge-crimes.pages.dev. All required bindings and secrets configured. Smoke: health, session mint, origin enforcement, mission accept/complete/fail, district room, districts (6), missions (13). Pages HTTP 200, API URL baked into bundle. KV cache returning MISS due to free-tier eventual consistency (expected).
success_criteria: Real Cloudflare bindings and secrets are configured
Deployed read and write flows are smoke-tested
Deployment readiness is only claimed if those checks pass

env_vars: PUBLIC_ORIGIN_ALLOWLIST (required on Worker for deployed write routes)
PUBLIC_SESSION_SECRET (required Worker secret outside local development)
ADMIN_SEED_SECRET (optional Worker secret for non-local reseeding)

tests.browser_smoke: passed on 2026-03-07 — Checkpoint 3 UX fixes and Checkpoint 4 waypoint persistence not yet verified in smoke harness
tests.manual_browser: not run — code-review pass performed instead for Checkpoint 3; Checkpoint 4 not browser-tested
